name: cure-voicer
author: Cure Voicer Contributors
description: Private, local-first desktop dictation for macOS and Windows.

scripts.pack:win:portable: npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.pack:win:nsis: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
